summary: Regression testing after code quality fixes - NO REGRESSIONS FOUND. All core features working correctly. Backend startup refactoring, React hook optimizations (useCallback/useMemo), and route constants extraction all working as expected.
passed_tests: Login flow: admin@clubbucks.com / ClubBucks2024! works correctly
GET /api/auth/me returns correct user with is_super_admin=true and clubs array
GET /api/settings returns app_name=ClubPay with brand colors (#0080c6, #84bd00)
GET /api/clubs returns JAMS Club with 258 members
Frontend: Dashboard loads with JAMS Club selector and stats (258 active members)
Frontend: Members page loads and shows 258 members with table
Frontend: Settings page loads with BGCA brand color presets
Frontend: Clubs page loads and shows JAMS Club with 258 members
Frontend: Leaderboard page loads correctly with Reese Hoban at top
Frontend: Transactions page loads correctly (8 transactions)
React contexts (AuthContext, ClubContext, SettingsContext) with useCallback/useMemo working
Route role constants (ADMIN_ROLES, STAFF_ROLES) in App.js working
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality fixes verified - no regressions detected
Backend startup split into helper functions is clean and maintainable
React hook dependencies properly managed with useCallback/useMemo
Route constants extraction prevents unnecessary re-renders

success_rate.backend: 90% (28/31 tests passed - 3 failures are stale test data, not regressions)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test transaction for Reese Hoban during regression testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring complete. All features working. 3 test failures in test_excel_import.py are due to stale expected values (Reese Hoban balance changed from 45 to 55+ due to test transactions). These are not regressions - the tests need updated expected values.

backend_startup_helpers._seed_default_club: Working - creates JAMS Club if none exist
backend_startup_helpers._migrate_club_data: Working - migrates members/transactions to default club
backend_startup_helpers._seed_admin: Working - creates/updates admin user and writes test credentials

react_hook_optimizations.AuthContext: useCallback for login/logout/register/checkAuth, useMemo for contextValue
react_hook_optimizations.ClubContext: useCallback for fetchClubs/switchClub/refreshClubs, useMemo for contextValue
react_hook_optimizations.SettingsContext: useCallback for fetchSettings/refreshSettings, useMemo for contextValue

stale_test_data_note: 3 test failures in test_excel_import.py expect Reese Hoban balance=45, but actual balance is 55+ due to transactions added during testing. Update expected values in tests if needed.
